note: Standard health checkups and vaccinations for adults.

vaccines.name: Annual Health Checkup
vaccines.description: General physical examination, blood pressure check, and basic screening.
vaccines.why_it_matters: Early detection of lifestyle diseases like hypertension and diabetes is key to long-term health.
vaccines.what_to_expect: Physical exam and potentially blood tests.

vaccines.name: Td (Tetanus-Diphtheria) Booster
vaccines.description: Tetanus and adult Diphtheria booster dose.
vaccines.why_it_matters: Immunity against Tetanus wanes over time. A booster is recommended every 10 years for adults.
vaccines.what_to_expect: Injection in the upper arm. Mild soreness is normal.

vaccines.name: COVID-19 (Primary Series)
vaccines.why_it_matters: Protects against severe illness and hospitalization from COVID-19 variants.
vaccines.what_to_expect: Mild fever, body ache, or soreness at injection site for 1-2 days.

vaccines.name: COVID-19 (Precautionary Dose)
vaccines.description: Booster dose for enhanced COVID-19 protection.
vaccines.why_it_matters: Maintains high level of immunity against emerging variants.

vaccines.name: HPV (Cervical Cancer Prevention)
vaccines.description: Human Papillomavirus vaccine for prevention of cervical and other cancers.
vaccines.why_it_matters: Highly effective at preventing cervical cancer and other HPV-related conditions.

vaccines.name: Pneumococcal Vaccine (PCV/PPSV)
vaccines.why_it_matters: Recommended for adults with certain health conditions or those over 65.

vaccines.name: Annual Influenza (Flu) Vaccine
vaccines.why_it_matters: Protects against seasonal flu strains which can cause severe respiratory illness.
vaccines.what_to_expect: Annual injection. Best taken before the monsoon or winter season.
